pages.text:
FleetLink Logistics Network
Q1 2025 Shipper & Carrier Network Update \| Freight Marketplace

Period: Q1 2025

FleetLink connects shippers and carriers through a technology-enabled freight marketplace. Transaction revenue is the primary
revenue driver.

Network & Volume Metrics

| Metric | Q1 2025 |
| --- | --- |
| Completed Shipments | 1.17M |
| Active Shippers | 3310 |
| Active Carriers | 7550 |
| Average Take Rate | 11.0% |

Financial Summary

| Metric | Q1 2025 |
| --- | --- |
| Gross Transaction Revenue | 8.9M |
| Gross Margin | 52% |
| Contribution Margin/Shipment | $2.19 |
| Marketing Spend as % of Revenue | 17% |
| Support Tickets/1,000 Shipments | 14.9 |

Gross Transaction Revenue of 8.9M in Q1 2025 was broadly consistent with Q4 2024 despite a 9% increase in completed
shipments relative to the approximately 1.1M shipments completed in Q4 2024, reflecting tighter promotional spend and improved
carrier pricing discipline. Gross Margin improved to 52%. The team ended the quarter at 199 employees, with additions focused on
carrier operations and data engineering.

(1) On-Time Delivery Rate for Q1 2025 was 95.4%; disclosed here rather than in the metrics table pending a format review.

(2) Gross Transaction Revenue reflects all fees earned on completed shipments; may differ from prior 'Platform Revenue' label.

(3) Contribution Margin per Shipment is post-carrier-cost, pre-overhead allocation.

(4) Headcount of 199 at Q1 2025 period end is disclosed in commentary; not tabled this quarter.
